tagline: Turn one wallpaper into light/dark and day-part variants, then export WinDynamicDesktop themes.

workspace.uploadHint: Upload PNG/JPEG/WebP, then produce a normalized baseline image.
workspace.needPrepared: Upload and prepare an image first

results.title: Batch Generation and Alignment
results.alignDesc: Use ORB + RANSAC + Warp on generated outputs

export.title: Export Wizard
export.heicFallback: Generated results are bundled as PNG files in a ZIP archive

settings.title: Settings
settings.routingHint: Use one BYOK provider for both analysis and image generation, and route requests through the Cloudflare Worker.
settings.promptSettingsDesc: These defaults are applied during scene analysis and generation.
settings.securityTip: BYOK only: API keys are stored in local browser storage as plain text.

errors.INVALID_IMAGE: Unsupported image file. Please use PNG/JPEG/WebP.
errors.SELECT_SLOT_REQUIRED: Please select at least one target slot.
errors.NETWORK_OR_CORS: Network error or CORS restriction. Check URL and reverse proxy setup.
errors.AUTH_ERROR: Authentication failed. Verify API key and permissions.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Permission denied (403). Check model access and account scope.
errors.REGION_RESTRICTED: This model is unavailable in your region. Switch model or route through an available region.
errors.QUOTA_LIMIT: Quota or rate limit reached. Retry later.
errors.IMAGE_SIZE_INVALID: Image size is invalid for the selected model. The app now auto-upscales; retry generation.
errors.TIMEOUT: Request timeout. Increase timeout or lower concurrency.
errors.PASSCODE_INVALID: Invalid key format. Please re-enter API key.
